detail.instructions: Change FileRead into a variant that stores std::io::Error in a source field marked #[source]. Update kind without changing the public error message.

hints.body: thiserror can expose a source without a handwritten Error implementation.
Use a named source field while this lesson focuses on explicit source tracking.

detail.completionExplanation: The top-level config error keeps its stable message while preserving the concrete I/O cause in the standard error chain.
